sourceTitle: AI in education - University of Amsterdam
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The UvA is developing its own AI chat environment: the UvA AI Chat. This application is similar to ChatGPT but is fully self-managed and specifically designed for UvA students, lecturers and staff.
rightsNote: Official university guidance. Rights reserved by University of Amsterdam.
